title: Wrong version of containers-common (>= 1.2.0~3)
body:
**Description**

<!--
Unable to install podman on debian 10 buster in docker container build.
-->

**Steps to reproduce the issue:**
RUN echo 'deb https://download.opensuse.org/repositories/devel:/kubic:/libcontainers:/stable/Debian_10/ /' > /etc/apt/sources.list.d/devel:kubic:libcontainers:stable.list
RUN curl -L https://download.opensuse.org/repositories/devel:/kubic:/libcontainers:/stable/Debian_10/Release.key | apt-key add -
RUN echo 'deb https://download.opensuse.org/repositories/devel:/kubic:/libcontainers:/stable/Debian_10/ /' > /etc/apt/sources.list.d/devel:kubic:libcontainers:stable.list
RUN curl -L https://download.opensuse.org/repositories/devel:/kubic:/libcontainers:/stable/Debian_10/Release.key | apt-key add -

RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y apt-utils &&  apt-get install -y software-properties-common &&  apt-get install -y containers-common
RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y uidmap && apt-get install -y podman


**Describe the results you received:**
The following information may help to resolve the situation:

The following packages have unmet dependencies:
 podman : Depends: containers-common (>= 1.2.0~3) but 1.2.0~2 is to be installed
          Recommends: crun but it is not going to be installed
          Recommends: slirp4netns but it is not going to be installed
          Recommends: varlink but it is not going to be installed
